title: Extra Gear Mod
description: This Mod adds a new custom gears added it to make Minecraft  more interactive.This was made first for only enderite now it is for different mods but there are many things added before so ModID is enderitemod.
body:
**EnderiteMod** is a comprehensive Minecraft mod designed to introduce high-end, rare, and powerful items into the game, focusing on Enderite, a new top-tier material that surpasses even Netherite in strength and rarity. This mod adds multiple new blocks, ores, and crafting materials that allow players to create the ultimate equipment and treasures, providing a progression system that rewards exploration and resource gathering.

**The core feature of the mod** is the Enderite Ore, which generates in the end and can be mined for Enderite Ingots and Enderite Scraps, the building blocks for crafting both powerful gear and unique upgrade templates. The mod also introduces Enderite Blocks, which are rare and visually striking, providing storage and building options for advanced players.

**A major highlight of the mod** is he end_ship 90% same as end city ships but this contains no dragon head more rare andhave mending and unbreaking elytra als this cvontains much loot and the enderite upgrade template. These chests can contain  items with a combination of common resources, rare items, and ultra-rare treasures like Totem of Undying, Enchanted Golden Apples, and Enderite Upgrade Templates. Armor and weapons from the mod can spawn with fully randomized enchantments, ensuring every piece is unique and potentially game-changing. Some chests are intentionally “degraded” to create a progression curve, while others are high-tier, jackpot-filled treasure chests to reward exploration.

**The main thing** is the new **HAMMER** which mines 3x3 blocks also the new gear and armor for Enderite.To get the gear and armor we have to contin a netherite equipment then the upgrade template found in end_ships and a enderite ingot made by 4 diamonds and 4 enderite scraps,enderite scraps are made by smelting raw enderite mined by enderite ore found in whole end.Alsd enderite horse armor has no recipe becuas enew update will have netherite equipment of horse armor then i will add that so untill the it would be ofnd in end ships.Enderite hammer is made by 2 diamonds in lne and covered with 5 enderite blocks.

If you find any bug you can tell me on my **E-mail**: hadijatt161@gmail.com .
1.21.11 update will contain enderite_spear_horse_armor recipe and natilus armor of netherite.And many bug fixes also.

**In summary**, EnderiteMod elevates Minecraft’s endgame experience by introducing a new rare material system, high-value loot, powerful enchantable gear, and customizable treasure chests, creating both a rewarding progression path and exciting gameplay for adventurers and builders alike. 
Should I add this mod on Forge also?Tell me on given E-mails.
